sourceNotes: Koufonisia local-source pass 2026-05-26: OSM way 229796834 names this exact Pano Koufonisi feature as Limni beach. Exploring Greece describes Limni as the first small beach east of Geitonia tis Eirinis, a small coastline indentation with pebbles and rocky seabed; a travel account and nearby accommodation listing also distinguish Limni from adjacent Porta.

metadata.sourceNotes: Low-confidence cleanup 2026-05-29: OSM relation 7009985 names this Kato Koufonisi feature as Limni beach, while Exploring Greece describes the matching post-Panagia north-coast beach/cove as reachable by a smooth 1.7 km walking route, with pebble beach, rocks, shallow water, unorganized status, path access, and a closed cove shaped like a small lake. Confidence promoted to medium for identity and physical metadata; no wind, wave, calm-water, protection, or live-condition claim was added.

metadata.sourceNotes: Low-confidence cleanup 2026-05-29: Exploring Greece directly supports Fykio on Kato Koufonisi, path access of moderate difficulty, small-pebble/rock beach and seabed, normal depth, and secluded/non-organized character; Koufonisia.net also lists Fykio among the best-known Kato Koufonisi beaches. Confidence promoted to medium; coordinates, windProfile, scoring, and live-condition claims were not changed.
